problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: BidInsight AI is an intelligent system that automates tender evaluation for government procurement.
summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tender documents, evaluate eligibility of bidders, and produce explainable evaluation reports. The system uses a hybrid approach combining natural language processing, rule-based parsing, semantic matching, and evidence mapping.
constraints_addressed: Inconsistent interpretation of criteria across evaluators
Difficulty in verifying compliance across heterogeneous document formats
Limited traceability and auditability of decisions
